title: Close PdfParser if error occurs during init
author: radarhere
body:
After #9519 added a new PdfParser test, there is an unclosed file warning in the test suite - https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/actions/runs/23934036444/job/69806741534#step:13:5392
```
Tests/test_pdfparser.py::test_trailer_loop
  /home/runner/work/Pillow/Pillow/Tests/test_pdfparser.py:131: ResourceWarning: unclosed file <_io.BufferedReader name='Tests/images/trailer_loop.pdf'>
    with pytest.raises(PdfFormatError, match="trailer loop found"):
```

This fixes it.
